projectDescription: A session-scoped skill loader for ChatGPT Projects that lets you package reusable skills as ZIP files, unpack them at runtime, and mount only what you need into the active session.
keyFeatures: Session-scoped skill activation — skills are active only in the current chat, with no permanent install
ZIP-based skill packages with a declarative MANIFEST.json
Explicit lifecycle commands: SKILL CORE UNPACK, SKILL <name> UNPACK, SKILL <name> LOAD
Support for fallback (simple) and explicit (structured) skill package modes
Build script with full package validation (paths, manifests, ZIP safety, UTF-8 checks)
Bundled skill-adapter for inspecting and adapting external skill packages
Clear runtime boundary: no hooks, watchers, daemons, or persistent state
Cooperative multi-skill composition within a single session
publicApiSurface: MANIFEST.json (core schema: system_name, version, primary_file, load_sequence, optional_load_sequence)
MANIFEST.json (skill schema: skill_name, version, primary_file, load_sequence, support_files, tool_files, asset_files, capabilities, runtime_hints)
